name: Recap: CPR
subject: CPR is easy as ABC
preheader: Reminder on how to perform CPR to save your loved one's life

blocks.text: It's been a few months since you did your Daisy First Aid class...
Hopefully, you won't need some of the skills you learned, but it's always good to have a reminder!
Think back to the class where you would have...

items: Opened the **AIRWAY** by lifting the chin

blocks.text: The CPR sequence for a **baby/child** (newborn up to the age of 18 years old):
Continue to repeat the cycle of 15:2 until help arrives.
If you are faced with an **adult** (over the age of 18 years old) then do as above but skip the 5 initial rescue breaths. Start straight away with 15 chest compressions.
Remember - always call for help asap!
We share lots of useful first aid advice for free via our Instagram account!
